title: Is Pentair (PNR) a Worthy Pick for Value Investors?
text: Is Pentair (PNR) a great pick from the value investor's perspective right now? Read on to know more.

title: Strong Demand & Buyouts Aid Pentair (PNR) Despite Cost Woes
text: Pentair (PNR) gains from higher demand for swimming pools, expected benefits from margin expansions and acquisitions despite accelerated costs.
